You go to the beach with Coil and he sees you in a swimsuit

Wolf Coil.. he's releasing the beast gng. I gave him the locs he deserves for a second time!! Info on on the playgrounders, Slingshot, and minor info on worldbuilding. Also slingshot mentioned in the intro.. I'm so sorry fellow ragebake shippers..

As a boombox main, I just want to thank all the coil mains out there for pocketing me and saving my ass. There's no greater feeling than beating up someone with you рҹҘ№. BUT, as vinestaff main, curse all of you who give me HEAL TETHER. Okay that aside Coil is still pretty cool. I have drawn him thrice in my entire life. That's more than I've ever drawn slingshot so be thankful. Also anyone get that thing where you're writing something and forget a basic word/saying?? I forgot the word convinced and I was just staring at my laptop for like 15 minutes but I remembered the word sporadically like what??
